zh.lifeSummary: 當Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua於1259年出生在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加庫尼亞時，他的父親Martim Vasques da Cunha24歲，母親Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães19歲。他和Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim至少有1個女兒。他去世於大約1325年在葡萄牙可布拉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua于1259年出生在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加庫尼亞时，他的父亲Martim Vasques da Cunha24岁，母亲Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães19岁。他和Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim至少有1个女儿。他去世于大约1325年在葡萄牙可布拉享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Martins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Francisco, Mario, Luis, Armando, Alvaro, Ana, Marcelo, Sergio.  Portuguese Joaquim, Joao, Paulo, Agostinho, Henrique, Afonso, Batista, Ademir, Amadeu, Anabela, Caetano, Heitor.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Martim, from Latin Martinus (see Martin ).
Dutch and German: patronymic from the personal name   Martin  . In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the more common Dutch and North German variant   Martens  .

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

variants.name: Martinz
meanings: Germanized form of Slovenian Martinc or of its variant Martinec .

nameMeanings.name: da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Cunha,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luiz, Fernando, Ricardo, Domingos, Eduardo, Jorge, Alberto, Americo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Agostinho, Albano, Conceicao, Henrique, Margarida, Vasco, Zulmira.
Portuguese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cunha; the ancient form of the placename is Cuinha, probably meaning ‘kitchen’ (from Latin culina). Compare Da Cunha .

variants.name: Cuna
meanings: Italian (mainly Apulia): perhaps a nickname from cuna ‘crib’.
Portuguese: nickname related to cuna ‘crib’, or perhaps a variant of Cunha .

variants.name: Da Cunha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Afonso, Albano, Almir, Ilidio, Serafim.  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Mario, Carlos, Alvaro, Fernando, Jorge, Rogerio, Alfonso, Alfredo, Armando, Armindo.
Portuguese: variant of Cunha , with the addition of da, a shortened form of the preposition de ‘from’ and the feminine definite article a ‘the’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of the medieval Spanish personal name Velasco or Belasco, from which is derived the surname Velásquez. The modern name has the same form as the Spanish adjective vasco ‘Basque’.

en.lifeSummary: When Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua was born in 1259, in Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal, his father, Martim Vasques da Cunha, was 24 and his mother, Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães, was 19. He had at least 1 daughter with Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim. He died about 1325, in Coimbra, Portugal, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua est né en 1259, à Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal, son père, Martim Vasques da Cunha, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim. Il est décédé environ 1325, à Coimbra, Portugal, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua 1259 in Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Martim Vasques da Cunha 24 und seine Mutter Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães 19. Er hatte mit Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1325 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Coimbra, Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua è nato il nel 1259 nel Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portogallo, il suo padre, Martim Vasques da Cunha, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim. Morì circa 1325, nel Coimbra, Portogallo, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábuaが1259年にポルトガルブラガブラガクウンハで生まれた時，父Martim Vasques da Cunhaは24歳，母Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomãesは19歳であった。彼はSenhorinha Fernandes de Chacimとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1325年にポルトガルコインブラで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua(이)가 1259년 포르투갈 브라가 브라가 쿤하에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Martim Vasques da Cunha(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1325년 포르투갈 코임브라에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua nasceu em 1259, em Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal, seu pai, Martim Vasques da Cunha, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1325, em Coimbra, Portugal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua родился в 1259 г. в местности куна, брага, брага, Португалия, его отцу по имени Martim Vasques da Cunha было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães, 19. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim. Он умер около 1325 г. в местности коимбра, Португалия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua nació en 1259, en Cunha, Braga, Braga, Portugal, su papá, Martim Vasques da Cunha, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joana Rodrigues Ruiz de Nomães, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim. Murió aproximadamente 1325, en Coimbra, Portugal, a la edad de 67 años.
